Description 2: Wallie beautifully combines bent oak with solid black metal creating an elegant wall-mounted drawer. The bracket embraces the magnetic wood drawer making the design both minimalistic and functional. Wallie is perfect for storing small everyday essentials in the hallway or as a bedside table in the bedroom.
Certifications: TSCA Title VI , CARB II , Prop 65
Designer Bio: An upcoming talented designer born in Denmark. In her design process, she is very meticulous and reflecting. With the aim of carrying on the Scandinavian design traditions, she creates simple design but functional designs with different purposes and functions.
Product Text: Wallie beautifully combines bent walnut with solid metal creating an elegant wall-mounted drawer. With its circular, soft shapes Wallie is a visually strong design that easily can act like a centrepiece or be combined with other designs. The bracket embraces the magnetic wood drawer making the design both minimalistic and functional. Wallie is perfect for storing small everyday essentials in the hallway or as a bedside table in the bedroom.

Description 2: Hibo captures the nature of hippos in a simple and lovable sculpture made from solid oak. With the deep black eyes, Hibo has a vivid look. The expression of the hippopotamus can change as the head can be tilted to either side giving Hibo a charming and wondering look on its face. On its own or together with its family, Hibo will bring enjoyment to any room it enters.
Designer Bio: A graduate from the Danish Design School. Since 1996, he has been running his own studio with great attention to create interaction between the design and the user. With a drive to create timeless designs, Steffen Juul focuses on the attractiveness of a design to establish a feeling of love and joy.

Description 2: With its round shape and simple design, Haak combines both beauty and functionality. The combination of the strong metal hook and the soft oak creates an elegant solution for hangers, bags or jackets. The clean lines in the outline of the hook make it ideal for the hallway or bedroom.
Designer Bio: Since 2014, Rikke Frost has driven her own creative studio in Aarhus based on the Nordic simplicity. With profound love for matching materials and great attention to details, Rikke Frost creates designs that should be seen, felt and touched. Rikke Frost was one of the first designers who teamed up with WOUD and with a shared vision she has been a great part of the designer collective ever since.
Product Text: With its round shape and simple design, Haak combines both beauty and functionality. The combination of the strong metal hook and the soft oak creates an elegant solution for hangers, bags or jackets. The clean lines in the outline of the hook make it ideal for the hallway or bedroom.

Description 2: The Tail Wing hooks are designed with inspiration from the shape of the backend of aeroplanes. With the lights on from above, the Tail Wing hooks will cast a shadow resembling the frontend of an aeroplane. The hooks are designed to hold just about anything you need from jackets and umbrellas to key chains and purses.
Designer Bio: A dynamic Finnish designer. He designs from a strong idea with great attention to identity, functionality, and quality. With elegant lines and soft shapes, he carries on the modern Scandinavian design tradition. He works primarily with natural wooden materials and minimalist aesthetics, creating pieces that are both beautiful and functional.

The hooks are designed to hold just about anything you need from jackets and umbrellas to key chains and purses.

Description 2: The Jeu de dés candle holders demonstrate true versatility by showcasing a surprising interplay of smooth geometric shapes.
Designer Bio: Living in Germany for more than half of his life, he graduated from the Berlin-Weißensee School of Art and Design in 2013. When designing, he believes that a design process is always determined by a mix of interdependent factors such as material, function, technology and aesthetics.
Product Text: The Jeu de dés candle holders demonstrate true versatility by showcasing a surprising interplay of smooth geometric shapes. With their various opportunities for adding different candles or using them as an aesthetic sculpture, the elegant objects allow you to have a playful approach while styling them to personalise your own composition. Combine the different sizes, turn them as you like and let them create a homely feel in the room.
